tool_args.label: Fuel Hedge Program description
tool_args.raw_text: The document presents Current ULSD Hedges for February 2023 through December 2024 and Annual Impact for 2023-2025.

payload.claim_text: MTA operates a Fuel Hedge Program that hedges Ultra Low Sulfur Diesel (ULSD) for months from February 2023 through December 2024, with hedged volumes ranging from 3,141,480 gallons (July 2023 peak) down to 206,408 gallons (December 2024), at hedge prices from $2.12 to $2.82 per gallon.

payload.description: Annual impact assessment date for the Fuel Hedge Program showing net impact of current prices and hedge positions for ULSD and CNG for 2023-2025.
MTA operates a Fuel Hedge Program hedging ULSD from February 2023 through December 2024
Source reports Annual Impact as of February 7, 2023 for the Fuel Hedge Program
The expected gallons purchased used for hedge percentages are based on pre-COVID consumption

evidence_refs.source_quote: * Expected gallons purchased are based on pre covid consumption.
